## Pattern Name
<!-- e.g. Rehost — Windows Server 2012 R2 with SQL Server -->

## Migration Scenario
<!-- Describe the workload type, source environment, and target Azure service -->

## Why This Pattern Is Needed
<!-- What gap does this address in the existing pattern library? -->

## Suggested IaC Approach
<!-- Terraform module, ARM template, or Ansible playbook preference -->

## Target Azure Service(s)
<!-- e.g. Azure VM, AKS, Azure SQL Managed Instance, App Service -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Dependencies, regulatory constraints, or known limitations -->
